name: Slack Notifier
summary: Sends a formatted message to a Slack channel via an incoming webhook URL.
description:
# Slack Notifier

Posts a message to a Slack channel using a Slack Incoming Webhook. The message body is rendered from a Handlebars template that can reference any field in the incoming payload.

## Use cases
- Alert on-call teams when a flow detects an anomaly
- Notify a channel when a business event completes
- Post structured summaries from LLM analysis results

## Notes
- Create a Slack Incoming Webhook at api.slack.com/apps and paste the URL here
- The `messageTemplate` supports Handlebars syntax: `{{field}}` and `{{#if condition}}...{{/if}}`
- Slack's `mrkdwn` formatting is supported in the template (bold with `*text*`, code with `` `code` ``)
- `webhookUrl` is stored securely and never included in exported flow documents

inputs.name: AnyPayload
inputs.description: Any payload. Fields are accessible in the messageTemplate via Handlebars syntax.

webhookUrl.title: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: Slack Incoming Webhook URL. Stored securely.

channel.title: Channel
channel.description: Slack channel to post to. Overrides the channel set on the webhook if provided.

messageTemplate.title: Message Template
messageTemplate.description: Handlebars template for the message body. Reference payload fields with {{fieldName}}.

iconEmoji.title: Icon Emoji
iconEmoji.description: Emoji used as the bot icon in Slack.
